news.headline: Get ready for a sizzling deal from Fazoli's - $4 pastas now available for a limited time! Don't miss out on this offer.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has surged to over 10,000 in the past 24 hours. This significant increase brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to more than 250,000. In response to the spike in cases, authorities have announced stricter guidelines and lockdown measures in heavily affected regions. Health officials are expressing concerns over the strain this surge is placing on the healthcare system, with hospitals now operating at 90% capacity. The government is urging the public to adhere to safety protocols and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC reports a net asset value of £725 million.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States increased to 5.2% in the month of August. This rise was unexpected as economists had predicted a decrease to 4.9%. Additionally, the number of new jobs added to the economy was lower than anticipated, with only 235,000 jobs created compared to the expected 720,000. This unexpected slowdown is causing concern among policymakers and analysts about the trajectory of the economic recovery. The disappointing performance in the job market is seen as a potential hurdle to overall economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: DoubleLine Opportunistic Credit Fund (NYSE: DBL) declares $0.11 per share distribution for July 2024.
news.summary: In the week of July 1, 2024, the DoubleLine Opportunistic Credit Fund, listed on the NYSE as DBL, announced a monthly distribution of $0.11 per share for July 2024. This distribution is pending...

news.headline: BLN Software rebrands as Bridge Loan Network, unveiling a new strategy on July 1, 2024, marking a bold change.
news.summary: A tech company based in VERNON, Conn., BLN Software, previously named Bridge Loan Network, recently revealed a new brand identity marking a major milestone in the company's evolution within the real estate software industry. The rebranding initiative signifies a strategic move and sets the company on a new trajectory. This news was shared on July 1, 2024, through a PRNewswire press release.

news.headline: Mathnasium introduces 'Ace Your Dreams: Mathnasium x Jagger Eaton Scholarship' with $2,000 prize for students.
news.summary: A supplemental education franchise focusing solely on math has formed a partnership with Jagger Eaton, a former Mathnasium student who is now a U.S. Olympic skateboarder and world champion. Eaton credits the program for providing him with the essential skills to excel in math and life. The collaboration will offer prizes such as a $2,000 scholarship and signed memorabilia.

news.headline: KeyBank funds $2M in Home Buyer Credits, aiding 442 clients in achieving homeownership, emphasizing affordability.
news.summary: KeyBank's recent funding achievement exemplifies its dedication to promoting affordable and sustainable homeownership for all individuals. On July 1, 2024, KeyBank revealed that it has successfully provided over $2 million in KeyBank Home Buyer CreditsSMi, benefiting 442 clients in realizing their aspirations of owning a home.

news.headline: Zum EV Program Manager Pallav Prakash named 2024 School Transportation News Innovator for electric bus conversion.
news.summary: Dr. Pallav Prakash, the EV Program Manager at Zūm, based in Redwood City, California, was recently recognized as the 2024 Innovator of the Year by Student Transportation. He was honored for his successful implementation of electric school bus conversion utilizing Vehicle-to-Grid technology. This achievement highlights Dr. Prakash's expertise in clean energy solutions.

news.headline: DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund (NYSE: DLY) declares $0.1167 per share distribution for July 2024.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on July 1, 2024, the DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund (traded as DLY on NYSE) announced a distribution of $0.1167 per share for July 2024. This distribution is subject to certain conditions.

news.headline: OFF!® Brand and The Weather Channel launch new In-App Mosquito Forecast, providing local OFF!Cast easily.
news.summary: A recently announced collaboration is focusing on utilizing weather data and information to provide individuals with their local OFF!Cast Mosquito Forecast™ as conveniently as they receive their local weather forecast. This partnership was solidified between companies based in Atlanta and Racine, Wisconsin, and was unveiled on July 1, 2024, as the summer season approaches with increased temperatures and humidity. The goal is to ensure users are equipped with essential insights and preparations as they anticipate the changing conditions ahead.

news.headline: Shelley Isaacson named new Board Chair of SeriousFun Children's Network, founded by Paul Newman. Leading global medical camps.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in NORWALK, Connecticut, Shelley Isaacson was warmly welcomed by the Board of Directors of SeriousFun Children's Network. This global organization, established by renowned actor and philanthropist Paul Newman, focuses on providing support to children through medical specialty camps. SeriousFun stands out as the primary network of such camps, offering vital services to a significant number of children worldwide.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC discloses total voting rights at 320 million.
Freedomology launches to help people achieve freedom in finances, health, relationships. Offers free 40-day health sprint starting July 21.
news.summary: A new company called Freedomology, focused on promoting freedom in finances, health, and relationships through technology and coaching, has recently been introduced in Cleveland. They have initiated a 40-day health sprint at no cost starting on July 21st. Freedomology aims to inspire individuals to embrace their lives by incorporating lasting wellness routines. Their approach utilizes innate human tendencies for successful and enduring results.

news.headline: American Discovery Capital closes Fund II at $190 million for lower middle market private equity investments.
news.summary: Located in Los Angeles, on July 1, 2024, American Discovery Capital (ADC), a reputable merchant bank, revealed significant news. ADC specializes in investing in founder-led and family-owned enterprises within the lower middle market sector.

news.headline: Metal Recycling Market to hit $767.9B by 2029 with a CAGR of 6.8%. Key players: ArcelorMittal, Nucor, CMC, etc. Ferrous type & Automotive sectors lead growth. Europe 2nd in value. Challenges in disorganized waste collection, product complexity.
news.summary: The global metal recycling market is projected to grow from USD 551.9 billion in 2024 to USD 767.9 billion by 2029, at a CAGR of 6.8%. Metal recycling involves converting scrap into new products to reduce environmental pollution. The process includes collection, sorting, shredding, processing, and melting. Recycled metals are used in construction, automotive, packaging, aerospace, and other industries. The market has grown due to increased scrap collection and capacity, supported by regulations. Factors like urbanization and resource depletion are further driving industry expansion. Ferrous metals have the highest CAGR, automotive industry is a significant end-user, and Europe is a key region. Challenges include disorganized waste collection in developing countries and complexity of products. Key players in the market include ArcelorMittal, Nucor, and Tata Steel.

news.headline: Hawkins, Inc. (Nasdaq: HWKN) acquires Wofford Water Service, expanding water treatment presence in Mississippi.
news.summary: Today in Roseville, Minnesota, Hawkins, Inc. (Nasdaq: HWKN), a prominent specialty chemical and ingredients company, has successfully finalized the purchase of Wofford Water Service, Inc. This acquisition brings Wofford Water Service, a distributor of water treatment chemicals and equipment, under the umbrella of Hawkins, Inc. Wofford Water Service primarily serves customers in Mississippi, with the transaction reflecting the ongoing strategic growth efforts of Hawkins, Inc.

news.headline: Vesta to release Q2 2024 results on July 25, with conference call on July 26 at 11am EST (9am Mex City time). Connect via webcast or dial.
news.summary: Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA) based in Mexico City, has announced that its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 will be released after market close on Thursday, July 25, 2024. The company will be hosting a conference call on Friday, July 26, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (9:00 a.m. Mexico City time) to discuss these results. Interested individuals can participate via webcast or by dialing in using the following numbers: International Toll-Free: +1 (888) 350-3870 and International Toll: +1 (646) 960.

news.headline: 2024 Presidential Election's top prediction platform, Polymarket, called world's largest by Bernstein. Simplifies blockchain for users.
news.summary: The technology simplifies the blockchain user experience by removing its complexity. Users find it similar to using any tech product that operates on a centralized database.

news.headline: BOSS Bonds partners with Associated Insurance Services to deploy SuretyBonds.Market platform in Cincinnati.
news.summary: Cincinnati-based BOSS Bonds Insurance Agency, a subsidiary of General Indemnity Group, has partnered with Associated Insurance Services of Boise, ID to utilize BOSS Bonds' SuretyBonds.Market platform. This collaboration aims to enhance the delivery of surety bond solutions. The SBM platform, exclusively available through BOSS Bonds, is a state-of-the-art technology tool for agents to efficiently provide these services to clients. Developed by industry professionals, this advanced surety portal facilitates seamless processing.

news.headline: Ray Martinelli appointed as Chief People Officer at Contentful, known for HR leadership in high-growth companies.
news.summary: Contentful, a prominent composable content platform headquartered in Denver and Berlin, recently appointed Ray Martinelli as Chief People Officer (CPO). Martinelli, a seasoned human resources executive, brings a wealth of experience to the role with a strong background in leading global HR strategies for fast-growing firms. His expertise spans various company sizes, from startups to those exceeding $2 billion. Beginning his career at Apple, Martinelli has played an integral role in supporting the HR functions of technology enterprises.

news.headline: Pega's 2023 Global Impact Report showcases commitment to ESG initiatives with insight into progress and developments.
news.summary: Pegasystems Inc., a prominent enterprise AI decisioning and workflow automation platform provider (NASDAQ: PEGA), released its annual Impact Report from Cambridge, Mass. The report offers insights into the company's achievements, advancements, and contributions in its ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) initiatives during 2023. This year marked significant changes with the rise of generative AI and ongoing transformations in work dynamics. Pega's latest Impact Report showcases its progress and capabilities in adapting to the evolving landscape.

news.headline: Calix (NYSE: CALX) will release Q2 2024 results on July 22, 2024, after market close. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: Calix, Inc. (NYSE:CALX) made an announcement that on July 22, 2024, following the market closure, their stockholder letter for the second quarter of 2024, ending on June 29, 2024, will be uploaded on the Calix Investor Relations website. The link to access the letter will be shared via the newswire and will be available at https://investor-relations.calix.com/. Additionally, there will be a conference call held by Calix to review these results, where they will delve into the financial details.

news.headline: SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) to discuss Q2 2024 results in conference call on July 30, 2024 at 8am Eastern Time. Results to be released at 7am.
news.summary: San Francisco-based SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), a digital personal finance company, will hold a conference call on Tuesday, July 30, 2024, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss their financial and operating results for the second quarter of 2024. The company is set to release these results on their investor relations website (https://investors.sofi.com) at around 7 a.m. ET on the same day. This announcement was made today.

news.headline: Brendan Murray becomes CEO of VOLLERS, Inc., a family-owned construction services provider. Leadership transition on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: In North Branch, New Jersey, on July 1, 2024, VOLLERS, a family-owned company offering comprehensive construction services, has revealed significant leadership updates. Brendan Murray, who presently serves as President of VOLLERS Excavating and Construction, Inc., HVI Services, LLC, and Layout, Inc.,...

news.headline: DoseMe improves web platform for precision dosing, offers enhanced user experience for caregivers, used globally by clinicians.
news.summary: Jupiter, Florida - DoseMe, a prominent provider of model-informed precision dosing (MIPD) software, unveiled its upgraded web-based platform, now accessible for general use. The technical enhancements aim to simplify workflow processes and provide a user interface similar to that of integrated DoseMeRx clients. This update is designed to enhance the efficiency of caregivers. DoseMeRx, a user-friendly decision-support software, is widely utilized by clinicians globally to assist in patient dosing.

news.headline: Federal court approves $4.2 million settlement for truck drivers in California, hailed as a win for logistics workers.
news.summary: Nicholas and Tomasevic celebrate a significant victory for logistics employees in California as a federal court in Los Angeles officially approves a settlement totaling $4.2 million. The agreement will benefit long-haul truck drivers operating out of ports in the region. The approval marks a positive development in the ongoing legal proceedings, providing relief and compensation for workers in the logistics industry.

news.headline: AVI Systems opens new Bentonville, Ark. location to cater to growing customer demand in Southern U.S.
news.summary: AVI Systems, a company headquartered in Minneapolis, has recently opened a new office in Bentonville, Arkansas. This expansion is aimed at providing support to both existing and prospective customers in the region. The move signifies a strategic increase in AVI Systems' presence in Arkansas, reflecting the company's commitment to catering to the growing demand for its services in the area. The Bentonville office will serve as a hub for enhancing customer relationships and delivering tailored solutions.

news.headline: 85% of brand and agency marketers rely on manual spreadsheets for media planning. New tool by Guideline aims to synchronize media planning and performance.
news.summary: A new tool has been launched by Guideline to improve synchronization between media planning and performance for advertisers and agency clients. This tool comes as a response to the slow progress in this area, with 85% of brand and agency stakeholders facing challenges due to the lack of effective solutions despite ongoing technological advancements in media advertising. This tool aims to bridge the gap and enhance efficiency in tracking and optimizing media campaigns for better results.

news.headline: BDO Global wins multiple 2024 Microsoft Partner of the Year Awards, including SMC-SI Empowering Customer Innovation and Secure Productivity on a global scale and Canada Country Winner.
news.summary: The prestigious Microsoft Partner of the Year Awards for 2024 were claimed by BDO, highlighting their achievements in various categories. BDO was honored in three key areas: SMC-SI Empowering Customer Innovation globally, Secure Productivity globally, and as the Canada Country Winner. This recognition underscores BDO's expertise and leadership in leveraging Microsoft technologies to drive innovation and enhance productivity on a global scale.

news.headline: Cognizant launches Cognizant Neuro® Edge platform for real-time AI data processing at the edge.
news.summary: A new platform called Cognizant Neuro®️ Edge has been introduced by Cognizant based in TEANECK, N.J., on July 1, 2024. This platform, part of the Cognizant Neuro®️ suite, offers real-time AI-enabled data processing capabilities. By leveraging this technology, various industries can enhance their data privacy measures and improve operational efficiency. Cognizant, listed as CTSH on NASDAQ, aims to revolutionize data management with this innovative solution.

news.headline: BELCO technology reduces NOx emissions at EU steel company with low temperatures.
news.summary: Business Wire reported that a European steel company has implemented BELCO®'s integrated gas cleaning solution for achieving stringent low-temperature NOx reduction. The technology ensures a significant decrease in harmful emissions, enhancing environmental sustainability. This adoption signifies a crucial step towards meeting regulatory standards and reducing the company's environmental impact.

news.headline: Tom Petty Estate signs global deal with Warner Chappell Music for iconic songs spanning over 4 decades.
news.summary: A significant agreement was reached today between the estate of Tom Petty and Warner Chappell Music, representing over forty years of legendary songs. This landmark pact features iconic hits like "Refugee," "I Won't Back Down," "Free Fallin'," "Here Comes My Girl," and "Learning to Fly," among many others. The deal, announced in Los Angeles on July 1, 2024, is set to encompass a vast catalog of music that has left a lasting legacy in the industry.

news.headline: Nissin Foods USA introduces Cup Noodles Campfire S'mores, their first dessert ramen option, on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A top instant ramen brand has unveiled its inaugural dessert ramen variety in a new limited-edition release. Based in GARDENA, Calif., on July 1, 2024, Nissin Foods USA introduces the Cup Noodles Campfire S'mores, offering a twist on the classic fireside treat. This new flavor marks a departure from the brand's typical offerings, emphasizing innovation in the food industry.

news.headline: Massage Envy selects 8 scholarship winners, each to receive $2,500 for massage school. Leader in massage and skincare.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on July 1, 2024, it was announced that eight individuals will each be awarded a $2,500 scholarship to pursue their education at a massage school of their choosing. This initiative was established by Massage Envy, the top massage provider in the U.S., known for their extensive franchise network and excellence in skin care services.

news.headline: MedSec hires Matthew Hazelett, ex-FDA official, as the chief regulatory officer. Key addition for the firm.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Miami, MedSec disclosed the appointment of Matthew Hazelett as their chief regulatory officer. Hazelett brings nearly ten years of expertise from his tenure at the FDA. This addition aims to bolster the medical device security services firm's regulatory initiatives and compliances.

news.headline: Opsera's Unified DevOps Platform now on Azure Marketplace, offers increased developer productivity. - 86 characters
news.summary: Opsera, a leading Unified DevOps Platform, has announced that it will now be available to Microsoft Azure customers globally. This integration aims to streamline operations by reducing tool sprawl and enhancing developer productivity. The collaboration, effective from July 1, 2024, is expected to benefit a large number of users across various sectors. Opsera's platform is noted for its ability to optimize DevOps processes and improve efficiency within enterprises.

news.headline: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) will release Q2 2024 results on July 23, 2024, via its website.
news.summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 23. The earnings report and accompanying presentation materials will be made available on the Investor Relations page of the company's website. This announcement comes as part of the company's regular reporting schedule, providing stakeholders and investors with important insights into Invesco's performance during the period. Stay tuned for detailed numbers and analysis from the upcoming release.

news.headline: LokiBots introduces Text-to-Actions feature, offering a zero-code Cloud AI Native Solution to replace RPA, Chatbot, Doc AI & Gen AI apps. Based in MILPITAS, Calif, announced on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Introducing LokiBots, a revolutionary zero-code cloud AI platform based in Milpitas, California. This cutting-edge solution is set to disrupt the industry by offering a single, comprehensive alternative to traditional automation technologies such as RPA, Chatbots, Doc AI, and Gen AI apps. By enabling Conversational Automation, LokiBots aims to elevate customer and employee experiences. The system, which was launched on July 1, 2024, guarantees a seamless transition from outdated automation methods to a new, advanced approach. With LokiBots, the future of AI-driven solutions is here.

news.headline: Eirion Therapeutics starts Phase 1 clinical trial for topical ET-02 to treat androgenic alopecia. First participant enrolled.
news.summary: Eirion Therapeutics Inc., headquartered in Woburn, Massachusetts, shared news on July 1, 2024, about the initiation of a Phase 1 clinical trial for their patented topical pharmaceutical ET-02. The trial aims to assess the safety of ET-02 for addressing androgenic alopecia, a common age-related hair condition. The company enrolled the initial participant in this trial. This significant milestone marks the beginning of evaluating the effectiveness of ET-02 in combating androgenic alopecia. The study seeks to provide valuable insights into the safety and potential of ET-02 in treating this condition, offering hope to the individuals struggling with age-related hair loss.

news.headline: Accenture Federal Services secures $250m contract from US Department of the Interior to support BLM IT platform services.
news.summary: Accenture Federal Services has secured a $250 million contract from the U.S. Department of the Interior to assist the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) in managing and upkeeping a cutting-edge mission services IT platform. The BLM, with a history tracing back to America's founding, aims to maintain the well-being, variety, and efficiency of federal lands for the benefit and pleasure of present and future generations.

news.headline: Livewire Ergogenics Inc. acquires minority equity in Verde Partners, owner of cannabis cultivation campus in Coachella, California.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, in Anaheim, California, LiveWire Ergogenics Inc. (OTC: LVVV) disclosed their recent investment in Verde Partners, Inc., a Nevada investment firm. This move secures a minority equity stake for LiveWire in Verde Partners, Inc., which operates a leading cannabis cultivation complex in Coachella, California. LiveWire specializes in procuring, leasing, licensing, and overseeing specialized real estate properties tailored for crafting top-notch, sun-grown cannabis items for both medical and adult recreational usage in California.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics will join Russell 2000 Index and Russell 3000 Index, boosting visibility, effective July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR), a biotechnology firm focusing on cell and exosome-based therapeutics for rare diseases, revealed its inclusion in the Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Index. The company's debut on these indices took place as U.S. markets opened today, marking a significant milestone for Capricor in the stock market.

news.headline: Boss Fight Studio introduces first-ever fully articulated Garfield action figures in partnership with Paramount, inspired by the classic comics. Deal brokered by FanGirl Consulting.
news.summary: In NORWOOD, Massachusetts, the long-awaited Garfield action figures have finally been launched for fans. Boss Fight Studio, known for creating popular toys, has collaborated with Paramount to produce the first-ever fully articulated Garfield action figures. These figures are inspired by the timeless comic strips that have entertained audiences for more than 40 years, offering a fresh way to experience Garfield and his charming companions. The partnership was facilitated by FanGirl Consulting & Brand Management, LLC. This exciting release marks a significant milestone for Garfield enthusiasts everywhere.

news.headline: 180 Degree Capital Corp. reports 16% average discount of NAV to stock price in June 2024, 19% year-to-date.
news.summary: In Montclair, New Jersey, on July 01, 2024, 180 Degree Capital Corp. ("180 Degree Capital") shared that the average discount between its estimated daily net asset value per share (“NAV”) and its daily closing stock price in June 2024 was around 16%. Year-to-date through the end of June 2024, this discount stood at about 19%. However, on June 28, 2024 - the last trading date of the month - the discount was recorded at approximately 16%. The company's NASDAQ ticker symbol is TURN.

news.headline: Best Brands implements LibTech's platform for digital transformation initiative, providing sales teams with access to real-time pricing and availability information.
news.summary: A digital transformation initiative by Best Brands in collaboration with LibDib has integrated LibTech's ordering and reporting platform. This innovative system offers on and offline sales ordering features for Best Brands Sales Teams, with real-time pricing, availability information, and a collaborative Sales Customer shared cart. The initiative aims to enhance the overall experience for stakeholders, utilizing LibTech's comprehensive tools. This partnership reflects a forward-looking approach by leveraging technology to streamline operations and improve efficiency in sales processes.

news.headline: Artelo Biosciences presents preclinical data on ART26.12 at cannabis research symposium in Spain.
news.summary: In Solana Beach, California, on July 01, 2024, Artelo Biosciences, Inc. revealed that Professor Saoirse O’Sullivan, the Vice President of Translational Sciences at Artelo, showcased preclinical findings regarding ART26.12, the company’s innovative fatty acid binding protein 5 (FABP5) inhibitor. This was done at the 34th Annual International Cannabinoid Research Society (ICRS) Symposium held from June 30 to July 5, 2024, in Salamanca, Spain. Artelo Biosciences, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as ARTL, is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical enterprise focusing on altering lipid-signaling pathways to formulate therapies for individuals grappling with cancer, pain, dermatologic, and neurological disorders.

news.headline: JB Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) to release Q2 2024 earnings on July 16, 2024. Conference call at 4-5 pm CDT. Visit investor.jbhunt.com.
news.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) of Lowell, Arkansas revealed plans to release its second quarter 2024 earnings after the market closes on July 16, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the same day from 4:00-5:00 p.m. CDT to review the quarterly results and address inquiries from investors. Those interested can access a live webcast of the call at investor.jbhunt.com on July 16 at 4:00 p.m. CDT.

news.headline: TRACON Pharma terminates ENVASARC trial due to low response rate (5%), below the 11% endpoint target, in 82 patients. Explores strategic alternatives.
news.summary: The blinded independent central review determined that in the ENVASARC pivotal trial with 82 evaluable patients, the objective response rate was 5% with four responders. This result fell short of the primary endpoint of 11% as established for the trial.

news.headline: Scilex Holding Co. gives preliminary unaudited financial results for June 2024; focuses on non-opioid pain management.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on July 1, 2024, Scilex Holding Company (Nasdaq: SCLX) shared preliminary unaudited financial figures for the month and quarter concluding on June 30, 2024. The company specializes in non-opioid pain management solutions for both acute and chronic pain. Scilex is dedicated to acquiring, developing, and marketing these products. The details released include revenue statistics for the mentioned periods.

news.headline: Check Point Software will announce 2024 Q2 financial results on July 24, 2024. Video conference call at 8:30 AM EST.
news.summary: Check Point® Software Technologies Ltd., a prominent cyber security solutions provider worldwide, is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter finishing on June 30, 2024, on July 24, 2024. The announcement will be made before the U.S. financial markets open. A video conference call with investors is scheduled at 8:30 AM EST/5:30 AM PST on the same day. For those interested, a live videocast of the call will be available on the company’s website at http://www.checkpoint.com/ir.

news.headline: Plumas Bancorp added to US small-cap Russell 2000 Index on July 1, as part of 2024 reconstitution. Membership lasts one year.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Plumas Bancorp, based in Reno, Nevada, was once more added to the US small-cap Russell 2000 Index. This inclusion was part of the 2024 Russell indexes reconstitution and became effective after the US market opened. To qualify for the Russell 2000 Index, a company must already be a member of the broad-market Russell 3000 Index. Membership lasts for one year. In addition to the Russell 2000 Index, Plumas Bancorp's stock was automatically incorporated into the suitable growth and value indexes.
